name: Uninsured employer after my fall in South Salt Lake, what benefits do I get?
description: Utah Uninsured Fund pays benefits; file with state.[4]

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer after my fall in South Salt Lake, what benefits do I get?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah Uninsured Fund pays benefits; file with state.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah has Uninsured Employers Fund for comp if employer lacks coverage.[4] Covers medical/wages like insured.[4] Key factors: prove no insurance; file with state fund; penalties on employer.[4] Report to labor commission, document injury, attorney accesses fund quickly.[3] Ensures you aren't left out.
